subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of the unseen and the seen! I beseech Thee by Thy Name, the All-Loving, which hath encompassed every witness and witnessed thing, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله الغیب و الشهود اسئلک باسمک الودود الذی احاط کل شاهد و مشهود بان
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for nearness to God
